overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting smooth traversal along a rocky coastline with turquoise water. The player moves past steep cliffs covered in coniferous forests toward a distinctive natural stone arch formation, with distant mountains visible under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: first-person bow weapon in upper right corner is sheathed and exits the frame

agents.ego_description: traveling forward along the water's edge in a boat or swimming, initially holding a bow that is then sheathed

entered.detail: tall layered rock formation with patches of moss and vegetation rising from the water
dense evergreen trees covering the top of the cliff ridge
large rock arch formation carved into the cliff face with visible cave opening
hazy blue mountains visible across the water in the background
clear turquoise water with gentle ripples reflecting the sky
light-colored beach visible on the distant right shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view showing a red bow in the upper right corner, indicating the player is armed. The camera moves smoothly forward along a calm body of water next to steep rocky cliffs covered in dense coniferous forest. Around the 5-second mark, the bow is sheathed and disappears from view. A distinctive natural stone arch formation is visible ahead on the left cliff face, while distant mountains rise in the background across the water.

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the coastline, approaching the rock arch formation

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving steadily forward along the water, drawing closer to the large stone arch formation on the left cliff. The arch becomes more prominent and detailed as the distance closes, revealing the textured layers of the rock. The coniferous forest continues along the cliff top, and the calm turquoise water stretches ahead toward the distant mountains.

events.description: birds fly across the sky from left to right above the cliff

agents.ego_description: passing alongside the rock arch formation, moving from the approach to the departure phase

notable_agents.action: birds flying across the sky above the cliff line

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the stone arch formation, which now appears to the left and begins receding into the distance. Birds fly across the cloudy sky above the cliff. The rocky coastline continues ahead with the coniferous forest canopy visible on the ridge, while the water remains calm and clear with turquoise hues near the shore.

agents.ego_description: moving past the arch formation into open water with new coastline visible ahead

entered.detail: distant rocky peninsula extending into the water marking the next section of coastline

segments.scene_description: The stone arch formation disappears from view behind the camera as the journey continues along the coastline. The camera moves toward a distant rocky headland that marks the next bend in the shore. The steep cliffs with dense coniferous forest continue on the left, and the calm water stretches ahead under the partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rocky coastline, moving from an initial approach toward a natural stone arch to a steady progression toward a distant headland. It begins with a red bow visible in the frame as the camera glides past steep cliffs covered in dense coniferous forest, with the bow soon being sheathed as the view opens toward a distinctive stone arch on the left. As the camera draws closer, the textured layers of the arch become prominent against the turquoise water and distant mountains before the formation eventually recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts as birds fly across the cloudy sky and the arch disappears behind the camera, leaving the forested ridge to line the path forward. Finally, the movement continues along the calm shore, turning toward a rocky headland that marks the next bend in the coastline.
